--- graph_table_next.sql
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph LET a = 1 RETURN a AS x NEXT FILTER WHERE x > 0 RETURN x) AS t

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.Star{
        Star: 7,
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   9,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 14,
        RParen:     92,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 27,
              NameEnd: 35,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
          Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
            &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
              Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
                &ast.GQLLet{
                  Let:   36,
                  Items: []*ast.GQLLetItem{
                    &ast.GQLLetItem{
                      Ident: &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 40,
                        NameEnd: 41,
                        Name:    "a",
                      },
                      Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                        ValuePos: 44,
                        ValueEnd: 45,
                        Base:     10,
                        Value:    "1",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLReturn{
                  Return: 46,
                  Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
                    &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                      Star: -1,
                      Expr: &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 53,
                        NameEnd: 54,
                        Name:    "a",
                      },
                      Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                        As:    55,
                        Alias: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 58,
                          NameEnd: 59,
                          Name:    "x",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
            &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
              Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
                &ast.GQLFilter{
                  Filter: 65,
                  Where:  72,
                  Expr:   &ast.BinaryExpr{
                    Op:   ">",
                    Left: &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 78,
                      NameEnd: 79,
                      Name:    "x",
                    },
                    Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
                      ValuePos: 82,
                      ValueEnd: 83,
                      Base:     10,
                      Value:    "0",
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLReturn{
                  Return: 84,
                  Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
                    &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                      Star: -1,
                      Expr: &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 91,
                        NameEnd: 92,
                        Name:    "x",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
        As: &ast.AsAlias{
          As:    94,
          Alias: &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 97,
            NameEnd: 98,
            Name:    "t",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph LET a = 1 RETURN a AS x NEXT FILTER WHERE x > 0 RETURN x) AS t
